auth.invalid_password: Password does not meet security requirements
auth.security_challenge_required: Additional verification is required to complete sign in
auth.invalid_refresh_token: Refresh token is invalid or no longer active
auth.same_password_not_allowed: New password must be different from the current password
auth.2fa_enable_success: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app and confirm with the generated code
auth.2fa_verify_success: Two-factor authentication enabled successfully. Store your recovery codes in a safe place
auth.2fa_setup_not_initiated: You must start the activation process first
auth.trusted_country_removed: Country removed from your trusted list
auth.trusted_country_already_exists: This country is already in your trusted list
auth.trusted_country_not_found: This country is not in your trusted list
auth.trusted_country_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of trusted countries allowed
auth.session_not_found: Session not found or already closed
auth.email_verified: Email verified successfully. You can now sign in
auth.email_not_verified: Please verify your email address before signing in
auth.invalid_verification_token: The verification token is invalid or has expired
auth.email_already_verified: This email address has already been verified
auth.verification_email_sent: If an unverified account exists with that email, you will receive an activation link
